programs.title: The Simpsons
programs.desc: Springfield's hooked on a weight loss drug. Homer's not sold on it, until Marge begs him to take it. But there's a side effect..

programs.title: The Simpsons
programs.desc: S. I Hate You: Marge's reputation as Springfield's nicest resident is jeopardised when her secret stash of vitriolic letters is stolen during a house party.

programs.title: Modern Family
programs.desc: When Manny and Luke's little league team unexpectedly makes it into a playoff game, Claire and Cameron scramble to find a location for it.

programs.title: Modern Family
programs.desc: With the baby coming, Jay and Gloria go to great lengths to throw Manny an extra-special surprise 14th birthday party - and there are plenty of surprises indeed.

programs.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programs.desc: In the ultimate 'here's what you could've won', the participants meet their alternate matches. And it turns out to be pretty interesting..

programs.title: First Dates
programs.desc: Aspiring rapper Matt meets music producer Breda. Abbie warms up a tongue-tied Matt. And can dynamic grandma Karen give retired teacher Jim's dating game a much-needed boost.
